meaning: n.煽动政治家(尤指利用情绪或偏见煽动民众,以期获得领导地位及达到私人目的的人)
examples: They labelled him as a demagogue.
The demagogue has won people's support.
Everybody knows it, the Republicans want to demagogue it and make a scapegoat population.
This is Newt Gingrich the demagogue, assaulting Mitt Romney the epitome of a good, productive capitalist.
